list.testimonial: Working with Patrycja helped me navigate a period of deep anxiety. Her approach is professional yet incredibly warm; I felt truly seen for the first time.
list.name: Sarah J.

list.testimonial: I was skeptical about therapy, but the safe environment created here allowed me to explore my burnout and find a way back to myself. Highly recommended.
list.name: Michael Lowrey

list.testimonial: The sessions helped me rebuild my self-esteem after a difficult relationship. The space is non-judgmental and the growth I've seen in myself is profound.
list.name: Elena M.

list.testimonial: A very focused and evidence-based approach. I appreciated the practical tools provided to manage my daily stress and the clear communication.
list.name: David

testimonials.success_msg: Thank you. Your testimonial has been sent for review.
testimonials.anon_hint: If selected, your name will be hidden to ensure total privacy.
testimonials.modal_desc: Your words can help others find the courage to seek support. All submissions are reviewed for privacy before publishing.
testimonials.subtitle: Voices of those who have walked this path, respecting the sanctity of the therapeutic space and personal privacy.
